explanation: Reordering: The command line is reordered to avoid the suspicious ' /dest:rdp-tcp#' string being directly adjacent to the executable, which may cause the Sigma rule to miss it.
Insertion: Inserting harmless spaces or escape characters around the suspicious string may prevent the Sigma rule from matching it.
Substitution: Replacing ' /dest:rdp-tcp#' with an equivalent syntax or harmless placeholder may prevent the Sigma rule from matching it.
